user_prompts.text:
Direct utility invocation for `/circuit:handoff`.

## Purpose

Save, explicitly resume, or clear session continuity across session boundaries.

## Examples

Fast modes are positional subcommands:

```
/circuit:handoff                            # Draft continuity from conversation and save
/circuit:handoff resume                     # Present saved continuity and pick up
/circuit:handoff done                       # Clear continuity and detach the current run
```

## Bootstrap Contract

Launch the `circuit:handoff` skill immediately.
Execute argument-selected fast modes before context gathering.
Use hook-authored helper wrappers from `.circuit/bin/` when the utility needs Circuit helpers.
Do not do broad repo exploration unless the utility contract explicitly requires it.


ARGUMENTS: resu

Direct slash-command invocation for `/circuit:run <task>`.

## Purpose

The primary Circuit router.

## Examples

Prefix a task with a built-in intent to skip classification and dispatch directly:

| Prefix | Workflow | Rigor |
|--------|----------|-------|
| `fix:` | Repair | Lite |
| `repair:` | Repair | Deep |
| `develop:` | Build | Standard |
| `decide:` | Explore | Tournament |
| `migrate:` | Migrate | Deep |
| `cleanup:` | Sweep | Standard |
| `overnight:` | Sweep | Autonomous |
| (none) | (classify) | (auto) |

```
/circuit:run <task>                         # Router classifies
/circuit:run fix: login drops the session   # Dispatch to Repair Lite
/circuit:run develop: add SSO flow          # Dispatch to Build Standard
/circuit:run cleanup: unused exports        # Dispatch to Sweep S
```

Base directory for this skill: /Users/petepetrash/Code/ever/arc-design-studio/.claude/skills/code-conventions

Applies when writing, reviewing, or renaming any code in this project — components, functions, constants, types, hooks, files.

## Stack Rules

- **No raw HTML elements** — never use `<button>`, `<input>`, `<span>`, `<div role="button">` with manual styling. Every interactive or styled element must use a design system component. If a component doesn't fit, add a variant or create a new component — don't bypass the system.
- **shadcn components** from `src/components/ui/` — import from `@/components/ui/*`, never from `@base-ui/react` directly
- **Tailwind CSS only** — no CSS-in-JS, no inline style objects. No `!important` (`!` prefix). Use `cn()` from `@/lib/utils` for class mergin

Base directory for this skill: /Users/petepetrash/Code/ever/arc-design-studio/.claude/skills/motion

Applies when adding, reviewing, or debugging animations, transitions, gestures, scroll-linked effects, or layout animations.

## Import

```tsx
import { motion, AnimatePresence } from "motion/react"
import { useAnimate, useScroll, useTransform, useSpring, useInView } from "motion/react"
```

Never import from `framer-motion` — always `motion/react`.

## When to Use motion vs CSS

| Effect | Use |
|--------|-----|
| Hover color/opacity | Tailwind `transition-colors` / `transition-opacity` |
| Simple enter fade | CSS `@starting-style` or Tailwind `animate-in` |
| Spring physics | motion |
| Exit animations | motion + AnimatePresence |
| Drag with physics | motion drag |
| Scroll-linked | moti

final_assistant_text_tail: Handoff saved. Next session: run `/circuit:handoff resume` to inspect and continue, or name a new task via `/circuit:run <task>` to start fresh.
